name: @rozie-ui/toast

scripts.typecheck: echo 'meta-pkg: pure-Rozie source; the emitted leaves typecheck individually, the surface gate runs under vitest'

comment:vue-mount-devdeps: timers.behavior.test.ts / dismissed.behavior.test.ts / patch-promise.behavior.test.ts (mount-and-drive, the combobox seed-query.behavior.test.ts precedent): import the committed leaf packages/vue/src/Toaster.vue and mount it via plain `vue` createApp/h — @vitejs/plugin-vue transforms the SFC, happy-dom supplies the DOM.
